Watch a clip of Rep. Al Green on @CSPAN by clicking here: https://t.co/wHQDoJYpE1 https://t.co/2AqlWVtw9h

Congressman Al Green Joins C-SPAN’s Washington Journal to Discuss the ICE-involved killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, the Iran War, Impeachment, and Congressional News of the Day.
 
You can access the news segment by clicking the link here: https://t.co/c7l7wDSzeo https://t.co/wHA6JlhVvg

Congressman Al Green joined Democracy Now! to discuss the ICE‑involved killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, Congressman Green’s participation in a Houston rally with organizers demanding justice, and the upcoming Homeland Security Committee hearing that will examine the case.
 
You https://t.co/uiDxrHmKx5

Today, I stood with more than 30 plus organizations and countless community members in Houston, raising our voices for justice for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. We demand accountability when ICE agents kill innocent people, and make it clear: ICE must GO. https://t.co/y0Ryz1VRvI
